experience.title: Store/Training Store Manager
bullets: Led teams, training programs, new store openings nationwide

skills_and_achievements: Sales leadership; recruiting, hiring, training, coaching; staff development; KPIs, merchandising, visual execution; payroll, scheduling, HR, performance appraisals; loss prevention/shrink control; community outreach/events; top sales manager (2010); quarterly sales +10% leading to promotion in 7 months; managed 20–35+ teams; awards: Best ADS ↑% over LY (2005–2008), Best UPT (2005–2008), multiple Guest Service Awards.
